---
format: cv-typst
firstname: "Jane"
lastname: "Doe"
affiliation: "Department of Example Studies | Your University"
address: "123 College Ave, City, ST 12345"
phone: "(555) 555-0100"
email: "jane.doe@university.edu"
websiteurl: "https://janedoe.example"
websitedisplay: "janedoe.example"
github: "https://github.com/janedoe"
githubhandle: "janedoe"
linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe"
linkedinhandle: "janedoe"
twitter: "https://x.com/janedoe"
twitterhandle: "janedoe"
orcidurl: "https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000"
orcidhandle: "0000-0000-0000-0000"
google-scholar: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=XXXX"
google-scholarhandle: "Google Scholar"
papersize: us-letter
---

# Employment

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "Associate Professor",
  organization: "Your University",
  location: "City, ST",
  dates: "2023 – Present",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "Assistant Professor",
  organization: "Your University",
  location: "City, ST",
  dates: "2017 – 2023",
)
```

# Education

```{=typst}
#cv-entry(
  title: "Ph.D., Example Studies",
  organization: "Flagship University",
  location: "City, ST",
  dates: "2017",
  description: "Dissertation: The Title of the Dissertation",
)

#cv-entry(
  title: "B.A., Example Studies",
  organization: "Another University",
  location: "City, ST",
  dates: "2011",
)
```

# Publications

```{=typst}
#pub-entry(
  authors: "*Doe, Jane*, and John Smith",
  title: "The Effect of X on Y: A Study",
  venue: "Journal of Example Studies",
  year: "2024",
  doi: "10.1000/xyz123",
)

#pub-entry(
  authors: "*Doe, Jane*",
  title: "An Earlier Paper",
  venue: "Another Journal",
  year: "2021",
)
```

# Teaching

```{=typst}
#teaching-entry(
  course: "Introduction to Example Studies",
  institution: "Your University",
  terms: "Fall 2023, Fall 2024",
)

#teaching-entry(
  course: "Advanced Methods",
  institution: "Your University",
  terms: "Spring 2024",
)
```

# Service

```{=typst}
#service-list((
  "Reviewer: Journal of Example Studies (2023 – Present)",
  "Program Committee: Example Conference (2024)",
  "Departmental Curriculum Committee (2022 – 2024)",
))
```

# References

```{=typst}
#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 2em,
  reference-entry(
    name: "Prof. First Reference",
    title: "Professor of Example Studies",
    institution: "Flagship University",
    email: "first.ref@flagship.edu",
  ),
  reference-entry(
    name: "Prof. Second Reference",
    title: "Professor of Example Studies",
    institution: "Another University",
    email: "second.ref@another.edu",
  ),
)
```
